description.from: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing 157*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+121.2% ATK as Physical DMG, pulling them in front of you. Then deals 105*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+80.8% ATK as Physical DMG to enemies within range and stuns them for 1sec.
description.to: Throws a spear at the furthest enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG and drawing the enemy in front of the hero. Then deals ??? P.DMG to enemies in range, stunning them for 3 sec.

description.from: For 5sec, your Physical Block Chance is increased by 800. When you block, deals 95*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+72.6% ATK as Physical DMG to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by 25%.
description.to: Upon blocking enemy attack for 15 sec, triggers a shockwave that deals ??? P.DMG to enemies in range, reducing their ATK by 20%.

description.from:
For 5sec, increases all allies’ Physical Block Chance by 400 and prepares to leap.
While preparing, becomes immune to status ailments. When you block, increases the leap attack’s DMG by 8% and deals 126*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+96.8% ATK as Physical DMG to the attacker.
When preparation ends, leaps to the nearest enemy, dealing 465*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+357.5% ATK as Physical DMG and stuns them for 1sec.
description.to: Upon DMG block during casting, jump attack DMG is increased by 7%. Also, deals ??? P.DMG to enemy and inflicts stun. After casting, jumps and attacks the enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG and stunning them for 4 sec. Gains immunity to CC while the skill is in use.

description.from: Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 60*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Block Chance by 120.
description.to: All allies' P.DEF is increased by ??? and P.Block chance is increased by 250.

IV.from: Increases the duration of stun by 0.5 sec.
IV.to: Stun duration is increased by 2 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but pulls in 2 enemies.
light.to: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, pull in 2 enemies.

dark.to: All pulled enemies take 25% increased DMG from all sources for 10 sec.

light.to: Deals extra P.DMG based on P.DEF.

dark.from: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 15% for 5 sec.
dark.to: Ally P.DEF is boosted by 20% for 10 sec after activation.

dark.from: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical DMG reduction by 30% for 5 sec.
dark.to: While casting, all allies take 20% reduced P.DMG.

light.from: Physical Defense increase amount increases by 50%.
light.to: P.DEF is increased by 20% and P. Block is boosted by 50%.

dark.to: Recovers HP equal to 40% of P.DEF upon blocking.

description.from: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by 400 and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.
description.to: [Will to Win] Increases DMG by 50% and P.Weakness of the target by {0}% for 10 sec.

description.from: [Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by 24% and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.
description.to: [Steel Fortress] Mana cost is reduced by 1 and jump attack's Stun duration is increased by {0} sec.

description.from: [Spearhead] recovers 40% of P.DEF every sec when blocking, and increases P.DEF gained by {0}% for 5 sec. P.DEF Boost can stack up to 5 times.
description.to: [Spearhead] Increases DEF boost by 50%. All allies have their P.Crit Resistance increased by {0}.

dark.from: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by 15% for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
dark.to: At the beginning of every battle, decrease the ATK of all enemies by 20% for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from:
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by {0}%.
On block, has a {1}% chance to restore {2} Mana to yourself and reduce the cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.
description.to: Increases P.DEF of all allies by {0}%. Blocking an enemy attack has a {1}% chance to recover {2}% Mana and reduce Cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.
